name: SectionMarkBase.SectionMarkTagAttributes
summary: The SectionMarkTagAttributes class contains attributes for section mark tags.

constructors.name: SectionMarkBase.SectionMarkTagAttributes
constructors.summary: Creates a new section mark tag attributes instance.

constructors.name: SectionMarkBase.SectionMarkTagAttributes
constructors.signature: public SectionMarkTagAttributes(SectionMarkBase.SectionMarkTagAttributes.TagShowOnSide showOnSide, TagLocation location, Vector offset, SectionMarkBase.SectionMarkTagAttributes.TagTextRotation rotation, ContainerElement tagContent)
constructors.summary: Creates a new section mark tag attributes instance with the given information.

params.name: showOnSide
params.doc: The side(s) on which to show the tag to be used.

params.name: location
params.doc: The location of the mark tag to be used.

params.name: offset
params.doc: The offset of the mark tag to be used.

params.name: rotation
params.doc: The policy for text rotation of the mark tag to be used.

params.name: tagContent
params.doc: The content of the mark tag to be used.

methods.name: IsEqual
methods.summary: Compares the current object with an object of the same type.

params.name: ObjectToCompare
params.doc: The object to be used for comparing.

returns.doc: True if all the fields (except for the database GUID) of the objects match.

properties.name: Location
properties.summary: The location of the mark tag.

properties.name: Offset
properties.summary: The offset of the mark tag.

properties.name: ShowOnSide
properties.summary: The side(s) on which the tag is shown.

properties.name: TagRotation
properties.summary: The policy for the tag rotation.
